National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN) 
Nursing Home Data Dashboard 
Print 
Updated January 22, 2026
Minus 
Related Pages 
On This Page 
Overview Nursing Home Residents: Vaccination, Hospitalizations, Cases Nursing Home Healthcare Personnel: Vaccination 
Overview Nursing homes report COVID-19, influenza, and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) data weekly to CDC’s National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN), including vaccination, cases, and hospitalizations among residents. Nursing homes also report COVID-19 vaccination data among healthcare personnel (HCP) to NHSN monthly. This page displays data among residents and HCP of CMS-certified nursing homes. These national and state-level summaries represent data from approximately 15,000 nursing homes
